prompt:
Add nicer terminal diff tooling to the owner's dev profile. Two things, matching local idiom (find where git/home-manager config lives — home/dev.nix and wherever programs.git is configured):
1. Enable delta as git's pager via home-manager's first-class support: programs.git.delta.enable = true (add sensible minimal options if the module supports them: navigate = true, line-numbers = true; nothing gaudy). If programs.git isn't currently managed by home-manager, wire delta the least-invasive idiomatic way instead (package + core.pager in the existing gitconfig mechanism) and say so in the PR.
2. Add difftastic (pkgs.difftastic) to the dev packages plus a git alias 'dft' = '-c diff.external=difft diff' (or programs.git.aliases equivalent) as the structural second-opinion diff — do NOT make it the default differ.
Verify: nix flake check; eval classic-laddie toplevel drvPath; eval the home configuration that CI builds. PR body: two sentences + note that valley review picks delta up automatically once the-valley's pager tweak lands (git var GIT_PAGER). Normal PR flow.
